category_sources: source_facts.description says Planck is a stand-alone ClojureScript REPL; official Planck docs are for Planck ClojureScript REPL.
display_name_sources: Official site uses the name Planck ClojureScript REPL; source_facts.name is planck.
docs_sources: Official Planck documentation is hosted at planck-repl.org.
